tasks.title: Add Engage models to schema.prisma
tasks.description: Add all 8 new Prisma models: EngageConfig, EngageKeyword, EngageMonitoredChannel, EngageTrackedAccount, EngageXReplyAccount, EngageOpportunity, EngageSentReply, EngageDataTicks. Include all indexes, unique constraints, and the EngageOpportunityStatus enum.
tasks.tdd: Verify schema validates with `pnpm prisma validate`; check generated types include all new models

tasks.title: Add extensions to Organization, Integration, Post models
tasks.description: Add back-relations to Organization (engageConfig, engageOpportunities, engageSentReplies), Integration (engageXReplyAccount), and Post (engageSentReply). No new fields — only Prisma relations.
tasks.tdd: Verify `prisma validate` passes; check Organization type includes all 3 engage relations

tasks.title: Run Prisma migration
tasks.description: Run `pnpm prisma migrate dev --name add_engage_tables`. Verify the migration SQL creates all tables with correct indexes. Verify `pnpm prisma generate` succeeds.
tasks.tdd: Migration file created; `pnpm prisma db push` succeeds on test DB; all 8 tables exist in schema

tasks.title: Scaffold EngageModule, EngageService, EngageRepository
tasks.description: Create the NestJS module structure: engage.module.ts (imports DatabaseModule + PostsModule), engage.service.ts (Injectable), engage.repository.ts. Register EngageModule in app.module.ts.
tasks.tdd: Module bootstraps without errors; `pnpm build` passes; EngageModule appears in app module graph

tasks.title: Implement all Engage DTOs
tasks.description: Create engage.dto.ts with all DTO classes: GenerateDraftDto, SendReplyDto, ScheduleReplyDto, ConfirmManualReplyDto, ListOpportunitiesDto, ListSentDto, SentStatsResult, ScoreStatsDto, ScoreStatsResult, AddTrackedAccountDto, UpdateTrackedAccountDto, AddMonitoredChannelDto, UpdateMonitoredChannelDto, SearchChannelsDto, UpdateReplyAccountDto. Apply class-validator decorators.
tasks.tdd: DTO validation tests: valid payloads pass, invalid payloads (missing required fields) throw ValidationError

tasks.title: Implement EngageConfig CRUD (getConfig, saveConfig, resetConfig)
tasks.description: Service + repository methods: getOrCreateConfig(orgId), saveConfig(orgId, dto), resetConfig(orgId). Controller endpoints: GET /config, POST /config, POST /config/reset.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: getConfig for new org creates default EngageConfig with setupCompleted=false; saveConfig updates fields; resetConfig sets setupCompleted=false

tasks.title: Implement Keywords CRUD (add, update, delete, list)
tasks.description: Service + repository methods for EngageKeyword: addKeyword, updateKeyword, deleteKeyword. Controller: POST /keywords, PATCH /keywords/:id, DELETE /keywords/:id. Enforce @@unique([configId, keyword]).
tasks.tdd: Unit test: adding duplicate keyword throws unique constraint error; deleting non-existent keyword throws 404; type defaults to 'CORE'

tasks.title: Implement MonitoredChannels CRUD + search
tasks.description: Service + repository for EngageMonitoredChannel: add, update (enabled/channelName), remove, list, searchChannels (platform-specific). Controller endpoints: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /monitored-channels, POST /monitored-channels/search.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: adding same channelId+platform twice throws duplicate error; search returns results filtered by platform

tasks.title: Implement TrackedAccounts CRUD
tasks.description: Service + repository for EngageTrackedAccount (external X accounts we monitor): add, update (enabled/categoryLabel), remove, list. Controller: GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE /tracked-accounts.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: duplicate username+platform throws unique constraint; tracked accounts are NOT Integration accounts (no token field)

tasks.title: Implement ReplyAccounts management
tasks.description: Service + repository for EngageXReplyAccount: getOrCreate per Integration, update (engageEnabled, autoReplyEnabled, timeStart, timeEnd, timezone). Controller: GET /reply-accounts (joins Integration), PATCH /reply-accounts/:integrationId.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: listReplyAccounts returns Integration records with joined EngageXReplyAccount settings; update persists timezone and defaultStrategy

tasks.title: Implement engage-scorer.ts with 5-dimension ScoreBreakdown
tasks.description: scorePost(post, keywords) → ScoredPost | null. Implements: Layer 1 keyword hard filter, Layer 2 computeBreakdown (keyword+heat+authority+recency+tracked). All 4 dimension scorers: computeKeywordScore, computeXHeatScore, computeCommunityHeatScore, computeXAuthorityScore, computeCommunityAuthorityScore.
tasks.tdd: Unit tests: post with no keyword match returns null; X post with 2500 likes+replies gets heat=35; post from tracked account gets scoreTracked=5; total = sum of dimensions; null followers returns authority=3

tasks.title: Implement EngageIntentClassifierService (local NLI + Haiku fallback)
tasks.description: OnModuleInit loads Xenova/nli-deberta-v3-small (44MB). classify(text) returns {intentTags, primaryIntent, intentScore}. classifyBatch(posts, concurrency=4). classifyWithFallback: if intentScore < 0.45 falls back to Claude Haiku structured output. Create engage-intent.constants.ts with INTENT_LABELS and INTENT_DEFAULT_STRATEGY.
tasks.tdd: Unit tests (mock classifier): multi-label output with confidence > 0.4 → multiple tags; single best label if none exceed threshold; fallback triggers when intentScore < 0.45

tasks.title: Implement engageScanWorkflow activities (scanX + scanReddit + persist + expire)
tasks.description: Activities: scanXPlatform (uses OAuth 2.0 from first enabled EngageXReplyAccount; calls X /tweets/search/recent), scanMonitoredChannels (switch by platform; reddit calls /r/{channelId}/search.json, updates lastScannedAt), persistOpportunities (UPSERT — updates scores, preserves status/intentTags), expireStaleOpportunities (NEW → EXPIRED after TTL_DAYS), updateKeywordHitCounts, updateLastScanAt.
tasks.tdd: Integration tests (mocked APIs): duplicate externalPostId upserts correctly; dismissed opportunity status NOT overwritten on rescan; expired opportunities have status=EXPIRED

tasks.title: Implement engageTrackedAccountsWorkflow (every 3h)
tasks.description: Separate Temporal workflow that polls tracked X accounts every 3h. Fetches new tweets since lastCheckedAt for each enabled EngageTrackedAccount, marks isFromTrackedAccount=true (applies +5 score bonus), runs through same score+classify+persist pipeline.
tasks.tdd: Integration test: tweets from tracked accounts get scoreTracked=5; lastCheckedAt updated after poll

tasks.title: Add Opportunities endpoints to EngageController
tasks.description: GET /opportunities (with ListOpportunitiesDto filtering: platform, status, intent GIN query, minScore, bookmarked, sortBy/sortOrder, pagination). PATCH /opportunities/:id/dismiss (status→DISMISSED). PATCH /opportunities/:id/bookmark (toggle bookmarked). GET /opportunities/score-stats (returns ScoreStatsResult with distribution, averages, top-by-dimension).
tasks.tdd: API tests: filter by intent='help_seeking' returns only matching; sortBy='scoreHeat' returns heat-descending; score-stats distribution sums to 100%

tasks.title: Modify XDto and CreatePostDto + postWorkflow to support reply_to_tweet_id
tasks.description: Add @IsOptional() @IsString() reply_to_tweet_id to XDto. Add 'engage' to @IsIn() source enum in CreatePostDto. In postWorkflowV101 postSocial() activity: read xSettings.reply_to_tweet_id and set reply: { in_reply_to_tweet_id } on postDetails before calling XProvider.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: CreatePostDto with source='engage' passes validation; XDto with reply_to_tweet_id='12345' passes validation; postSocial passes reply field to XProvider when reply_to_tweet_id present

tasks.title: Implement EngageDraftService (Claude Sonnet SSE streaming)
tasks.description: generateDraft(opportunity, strategy, brandStrength): AsyncGenerator<string>. buildSystemPrompt dynamically assembles from STRATEGY_PROMPTS + BRAND_PROMPTS + INTENT_PROMPTS (with 'discussion' fallback for unknown intent). Streaming via claude-sonnet-4-5, max_tokens=400. Add STRATEGY_PROMPTS, BRAND_PROMPTS, INTENT_PROMPTS as string-keyed Records.
tasks.tdd: Unit tests: buildSystemPrompt includes correct strategy instruction; unknown intent falls back to discussion prompt; brand strength 0 includes 'Do not mention AISEE'; streaming yields text chunks

tasks.title: Implement draft generation SSE endpoint
tasks.description: POST /opportunities/:id/draft → SSE stream. Sets Content-Type: text/event-stream. Calls EngageDraftService.generateDraft(). Streams data: {text} events, ends with data: [DONE].
tasks.tdd: Integration test: SSE response contains text chunks ending with [DONE]; unknown opportunity returns 404

tasks.title: Implement X send/schedule reply endpoints
tasks.description: POST /opportunities/:id/reply: calls PostService.createPost({source:'engage', type:'now', settings:{__type:'x', reply_to_tweet_id, who_can_reply_post:'everyone'}}), atomically creates EngageSentReply, sets EngageOpportunity.status=REPLIED. POST /opportunities/:id/schedule: same with type:'schedule' and scheduledAt, sets status=SCHEDULED.
tasks.tdd: Integration tests: sendReply creates Post with source='engage'; Post.settings contains __type='x' and reply_to_tweet_id; EngageSentReply.postId linked; opportunity status=REPLIED

tasks.title: Implement Reddit manual reply flow (2-step)
tasks.description: POST /opportunities/:id/manual-reply (Step 1): creates Post(source='engage', state=PUBLISHED, no releaseURL) + EngageSentReply; opportunity.status=REPLIED. Record shows in Sent with 'no URL' warning. PATCH /sent/:id/reply-url (Step 2): validates Reddit URL regex, updates Post.releaseURL.
tasks.tdd: Integration test: manual-reply creates Post with state=PUBLISHED and releaseURL=null; submit-url sets Post.releaseURL; invalid Reddit URL regex rejected with 400

tasks.title: Implement Sent list and stats endpoints
tasks.description: GET /sent: queries EngageSentReply JOIN Post JOIN EngageOpportunity, supports ListSentDto filters (platform via Post.integration, status derived from Post.state, date range, pagination). GET /sent/stats: returns SentStatsResult (weeklyCount, responseRate, totalImpressions, avgLikes).
tasks.tdd: Unit test: status filter 'manual' returns posts with Post.state=PUBLISHED and Post.releaseURL=null; weeklyCount counts only current week

tasks.title: Add source filter to DataTicks pipeline (isolate Engage from regular posts)
tasks.description: Modify getPublishedPostsWithRelease() in dashboard.repository.ts to add WHERE source NOT IN ('engage'). This prevents Engage reply posts from polluting the existing DataTicks aggregation for regular published posts.
tasks.tdd: Integration test: Post with source='engage' is NOT included in DataTicks sync; Post with source='calendar' IS included; existing DataTicks behavior unchanged

tasks.title: Implement engageDataTicksWorkflow (daily 01:00 aggregation)
tasks.description: Fetches Post WHERE source='engage' AND state=PUBLISHED AND publishDate IN yesterday bucket. Aggregates by platform (x, reddit, all): count/impressions/trafficScore. Upserts into EngageDataTicks for each (platform × type) combination. Platform is derived from Post.integration.providerIdentifier ?? 'reddit'.
tasks.tdd: Integration test: after workflow runs, EngageDataTicks has rows for 'x', 'reddit', 'all' platforms; SUM(impressions by platform) == total impressions; value is BigInt

tasks.title: Implement engageMetricsSyncWorkflow (authorReplied + Reddit metrics)
tasks.description: Triggered per EngageSentReply after send; sleeps 24h. X path: checkXAuthorReplied (search conversation for original author reply) → markAuthorReplied if found. Reddit path: if Post.releaseURL set, fetchRedditCommentMetrics → write AnalyticsData[] to Post.analytics in existing format (label/data/percentageChange); set impressions = (score+comments)×20; trafficScore computed by traffic.calculator.ts.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: checkXAuthorReplied returns true when author username appears in conversation; Reddit analytics written in AnalyticsData[] format; trafficScore NOT set manually (deferred to traffic.calculator)

tasks.title: Add Engage dashboard stats endpoint
tasks.description: Add GET /dashboard/engage-stats to dashboard.controller.ts. Service queries Post WHERE source='engage': weeklyCount, responseRate (authorReplied/total), totalImpressions (SUM Post.impressions), totalTrafficScore (SUM Post.trafficScore), byPlatform breakdown, bestReply (highest trafficScore this week), trafficByReply[] array for Traffic from Engage panel.
tasks.tdd: Unit test: responseRate = authorReplied count / total × 100; trafficByReply ordered by trafficScore DESC; byPlatform includes x and reddit keys

tasks.title: Add Engage navigation item and route layout
tasks.description: Add 'Engage' to firstMenu in top.menu.tsx (after Analytics). Create /engage/layout.tsx with tab navigation (Signal Feed | Sent | Settings). Create /engage/page.tsx skeleton. Check EngageConfig.setupCompleted; if false, show setup wizard instead of feed.
tasks.tdd: E2E: navigating to /engage redirects to setup wizard if setupCompleted=false; shows Signal Feed if setupCompleted=true; tab navigation switches between Feed/Sent/Settings

tasks.title: Implement setup-wizard.tsx (one-time initial config)
tasks.description: Two-column layout: keywords (left) + X accounts + channels (right). Keyword section with type badges (CORE/BRAND/COMPETITOR). X reply accounts from /reply-accounts. Monitored channels grid with platform badge + audienceSize. Bottom action bar with real-time summary and '🚀 开始抓取帖子' button. On submit: POST /config with setupCompleted=true, redirect to Signal Feed.
tasks.tdd: Component test: submit button disabled when keyword count=0; real-time banner updates on keyword toggle; Reddit URL validation shown before submit

tasks.title: Implement opportunity-card.tsx and feed-filters.tsx
tasks.description: opportunity-card.tsx: left border (black=X, orange=Reddit), platform badge, intent tags, score badge with color grade (85+=deep green, 70+=yellow-green, 60+=orange), author row, 2-line truncated body, keyword tags, engagement metrics, Generate Reply button, bookmark toggle, ⚡ Auto tag. feed-filters.tsx: platform, minScore (≥85/≥70/all), intent, status, date, bookmarked, sort controls.
tasks.tdd: Component test: score 87 renders deep green badge; bookmarked card shows filled star; clicking card calls onSelect; ⚡ Auto tag visible only when auto-reply enabled

tasks.title: Implement reply-panel.tsx with SSE draft streaming
tasks.description: 400px right-side drawer. Sections: original post preview (grey card), 3-strategy radio (EXPERT_ANSWER/DATA_BACKED/EMPATHY_LED), AI draft textarea with typewriter SSE streaming, brand-strength slider (0-3), account selector dropdown (EngageXReplyAccount engageEnabled=true only). X actions: Skip, Schedule (inline date picker), Send reply. Reddit actions: 3-step flow (Copy Draft → I Replied Manually → Submit URL). Character counter for X (≤280).
tasks.tdd: Component test: strategy change triggers re-generation; character counter turns red at 280; Reddit URL input validates format; account selector shows only engageEnabled accounts (NOT EngageTrackedAccount)

tasks.title: Implement keyword-manager.tsx
tasks.description: List all keywords with type badge (CORE default, BRAND green, COMPETITOR red), weeklyHitCount progress bar (relative to max), expand button for matched posts, enable/disable toggle, delete button. Add keyword input (Enter to confirm, auto-CORE). Competitor keywords default OFF.
tasks.tdd: Component test: adding duplicate keyword shows error; progress bar width proportional to max hit count; competitor keyword badge is red

tasks.title: Implement monitored-channel-manager.tsx
tasks.description: 2-column grid of EngageMonitoredChannel entries with platform badge + channel name + audienceSize + enabled toggle. '+ Add channel' opens search modal (platform selector + search). Delete button. Platform badge colors: Reddit=orange, YouTube=red, QQ=blue.
tasks.tdd: Component test: toggle OFF shows disabled state; platform badge color matches platform; add channel search filters by selected platform

tasks.title: Implement tracked-accounts.tsx and reply-accounts.tsx
tasks.description: tracked-accounts.tsx: list EngageTrackedAccount (EXTERNAL accounts we monitor) with avatar initials, username, categoryLabel (editable), platform, enable toggle. reply-accounts.tsx: list EngageXReplyAccount (OUR OWN accounts) with Integration display, engageEnabled toggle, autoReplyEnabled toggle, time window inputs (start/end + timezone), defaultStrategy selector.
tasks.tdd: Component test: tracked-accounts shows no token/OAuth fields; reply-accounts time window inputs disabled when autoReplyEnabled=false; timezone selector shows IANA zones

tasks.title: Implement sent-list.tsx with top-4 stats and filters
tasks.description: Page reads GET /engage/sent/stats for 4-cell header (weeklyCount, responseRate, totalImpressions, avgLikes). List reads GET /engage/sent with ListSentDto filters. Each row shows: original post snippet, reply text, platform badge, sent timestamp, Post.state badge, ⚠ warning if Reddit with no URL.
tasks.tdd: Component test: MANUAL Reddit records (no URL) show ⚠ 未提交回复链接 badge; weeklyCount cell updates on filter change; ERROR state shows red badge

tasks.title: Implement sent-card-x.tsx and sent-card-reddit.tsx
tasks.description: sent-card-x.tsx: 5 metric cells from Post.analytics — 👁 impressions (blue), ♥ likes (red), 🔁 retweets (green), 💬 replies (olive), 🔖 bookmarks (purple). Shows authorReplied badge. sent-card-reddit.tsx: 3 cells — ↑ score (red), 💬 comments (olive), 👁 est.impressions (blue, labeled '估算'). '⚠ 未提交回复链接' warning if Post.releaseURL=null.
tasks.tdd: Component test: Reddit estimated impressions shows '估算' label; X traffic index formula displayed; authorReplied=true shows author reply badge

tasks.title: Implement Engage Dashboard panels
tasks.description: engage-performance-panel.tsx: lime-green border, '💬 Engage' badge, 4 stat cells (weeklyCount/responseRate/totalImpressions/totalTrafficScore), platform split (X N replies · Reddit N replies), best reply card, 'View all →' link to /engage/sent. traffic-from-engage-panel.tsx: list of trafficByReply with progress bars, 'Traffic from Engage' header.
tasks.tdd: Component test: panel renders with lime border; 'View all →' href='/engage/sent'; progress bar width proportional to trafficTotal

tasks.title: Modify Dashboard page to include Engage panels and chart overlay
tasks.description: Add <EngagePerformancePanel> at top of dashboard content. Add lime-colored dataset to 'Your Posts' chart using EngageDataTicks WHERE type='replies' AND timeUnit='day'. Add <TrafficFromEngagePanel> in second row. Ensure DataTicks queries for existing charts exclude source='engage' (verified in T5.1).
tasks.tdd: Component test: EngagePerformancePanel renders above existing panels; chart dataset includes lime series; TrafficFromEngagePanel appears in second row

tasks.title: Modify Calendar to show Engage events with color coding
tasks.description: Add showEngage boolean state (default true) to calendar. Add source-based filter: when showEngage=false, exclude Post WHERE source='engage'. Color mapping: source='engage' AND state=PUBLISHED → amber (#FFF4D0/#D0A040, 💬 prefix); QUEUE → purple (#F0E8FF/#A070D0, 📅); ERROR → red (#FFE4E4/#D04040, ⚠️). Add 'Show Engage' toggle to toolbar. Add 'Engage' banner counter (amber dot) showing month total.
tasks.tdd: Component test: 'Show Engage' toggle=false hides Engage events; amber color applied to PUBLISHED Engage posts; banner Engage counter matches POST count WHERE source='engage' this month
